mdx.rawBody:
---
status: public
shortDescription: "Addition has higher precedence than string concatenation"
shortCorrection: "Addition and string concatenation have same precedence"
concepts:
  - String 
  - Expression
  - Operator
  - Precedence
  - Associativity
spec:
  - id: jls13
    sections: ["15.18"]
expressibleInNms:
- id: ExpressionAsTree
  how: expression using both operators
---

In a case like `1 + 2 + "AAA" + 3 + 4`, 
first the numbers are added so we get
`3 + "AAA" + 7`,
and then they are concatenated with the strings so we get
`"3AAA7"`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Addition has higher precedence than string concatenation
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Addition and string concatenation have same precedence
